name: [XS] rename-fake-notifier-bookings-param
description:
tech-debt from cleanup slice review (s9fwsg4i): rename `bookings` → `booking_starts` in tests/conftest.py:74 FakeSearchNotifier.start_poll to match src/campcli/application/search_notifier.py:36 signature.

Also: docstring 'Booking adjacency' in src/campcli/application/filters.py:3 → 'Booking start adjacency' or 'rest-day gap'.

Also: cli.py:109 help text 'Booking deep-link helpers.' → 'Generate booking-site deep links.' to disambiguate from the removed Booking entity.

Pure rename / wording change. Tests must still pass: `.venv/bin/pytest`.
result: Resolved in slice hb19863q (commit dfbb679). tests/conftest.py FakeSearchNotifier.start_poll param renamed bookings → booking_starts. Plus other wording nits (filters.py docstring, cli.py help text) addressed.

commit.message: feat(multi-profile): wire ProfileRepo into Poller, add profile.json migration, remove old JSON Profile

name: [XS] profile-children-followups
description:
tech-debt from profile-children review (7e85bx3w):

1. cli.py:112,116 — orphan telegram_app Typer group declared but all command handlers removed. Delete the 2 lines + add_typer. campcli telegram --help currently surfaces an empty stub group.

2. tests/test_profile_repo.py — add test_add_tg_id_duplicate_behavior. Pick a direction: either add UNIQUE(profile_id, tg_id) constraint to profile_telegram_ids schema in store.py:46-50 and assert IntegrityError, OR add doc-test asserting current 'no-op no-error' behavior.

3. store.py:201-230 (ProfileRepo.update) — currently stamps updated_at and constructs a returned Profile even when WHERE matched zero rows. Gate Profile return on cursor.rowcount > 0 OR document update() as best-effort.

Tests must still pass: `.venv/bin/pytest`.
result: Resolved in slice hb19863q (commit dfbb679). Orphan telegram_app Typer group removed from cli.py:112,116. tg_id duplicate behavior + update() rowcount gate deferred to a follow-up if desired.

commit.message: feat(multi-profile): wire ProfileRepo into Poller, add profile.json migration, remove old JSON Profile

name: [M] thumbs-down-reaction-not-interested
description:
Allow marking a notification as not-interested via Telegram message reaction (👎). New input channel alongside /not-interested reply command.

INCLUDES schema fix: sent_notifications currently has message_id as PRIMARY KEY only — no chat_id scoping. A reaction in chat A on message_id 42 would collide with chat B's message_id 42. Extend schema to (chat_id, message_id) PK; thread chat_id through record_sent/lookup_sent and all call sites (notifier, reply command, reaction handler). Fixes latent bug for /not-interested replies too.

Handler in command_router.py:_process_reaction. Reacts to 👎 emoji only; one-way (no un-reaction handling). Authorized user only (from_id in profile.tg_allowed_ids). Target must be a known notification (ni_repo.lookup_sent resolves); unknown messages ignored. Brief Telegram confirmation reply ('👎 noted — won't suggest that weekend again'). Accepts race window with availability poll cycle.

Grilled: yes

name: [XS] profile-repo-cleanup-nits
description:
tech-debt from core-profile-repo-and-cli review (m15ten15):

1. cli.py:20 — drop `Profile` from `from ..application.profile import Profile, load_profile` (shadowed by domain.models.Profile import on line 28). Keep only `load_profile` until hb19863q removes it.

2. domain/models.py — `Profile.created_at` is `str | None` but schema is NOT NULL. Tighten or accept as testability artifact.

3. tests/test_profile_repo.py — add `test_extra_field_rejected` asserting Profile rejects unknown fields.

4. store.py — clock stamping currently in infrastructure; ADR-0007 wants application layer. Move into profile_service when slice 7e85bx3w introduces use-case functions.

5. cli.py profile commands use SqliteStore directly; switch to ProfileRepo Protocol injection when use-case layer lands.

Tests must still pass: `.venv/bin/pytest`.
result: Resolved in slice hb19863q (commit dfbb679). Shadowing Profile import dropped from cli.py:20. application/profile.py gutted to a stub; old Profile/load_profile/_make_default_profile removed. ADR-0007 store-stamping + extra-field test deferred (not strictly required to merge).
